61	  `InjectiveResolution.exact_succ`/`exact₀`. (iter-005, all axiom-clean.)

152	  positive-degree exactness of an alternating-coface (Čech) complex, model it concretely as

211	  `Sigma.hom_ext`/`Pi.hom_ext`; reduce by `Sigma.ι_desc`/`Pi.lift_π`; index equality via
212	  `funext; simp [unop_comp, SimplexCategory.comp_toOrderHom]`; transport the injection/projection
213	  across it with a generic `eqToHom`-transport helper (`subst e; simp`); collapse `homOfLE = eqToHom`
214	  by `Subsingleton.elim` (homs in `(Opens X)`/`(Opens X)ᵒᵖ` are subsingletons) + `eqToHom_map`;
215	  combine with `← Functor.map_comp`. Needs `[Finite 𝒰.I₀]` for `HasCoproductsOfShape`. For finite
216	  index `∐` (coproduct) = `⨁` (biproduct) — use `∐`; it gives `Hom(∐,F)=∏Hom` directly.
217	- **`PresheafOfModules.evaluation.PreservesHomology` holds by `inferInstance` (iter-016)**: homology
218	  of a complex of presheaves of modules is computed objectwise by sectionwise evaluation. So a
219	  quasi-iso / acyclicity of such a complex can be proved by exhibiting, for each open `W`, a
220	  sectionwise contracting homotopy — lift objectwise via this instance.
221	- **Defeq-not-syntactic carrier mismatch — the dominant tactical hazard (iter-018)**: chain/cochain
222	  complex carriers `K.X n` are defeq-but-not-syntactic to the underlying `K.obj (op [n])` /
223	  `(F.mapHomologicalComplex c).obj K).sc i` vs `(K.sc i).map F`, etc. When a `rw [hd]` substitutes a
224	  `.obj`-typed term into a `.X`-pinned composition, `add_comp`/`zsmul_comp`/`δ_comp_aug` and friends
225	  silently fail to match. **Fix**: prove the underlying identity on a FRESH-elaborated standalone
226	  `have` (where the `≫` matches the helper's elaboration), then `rw`/`exact` it back. Do NOT rewrite
227	  into the pinned composition (re-breaks matching). (FreePresheafComplex `cechFree_d_comp_aug` repair.)

229	  contravariant-Yoneda composites, the `∏ᶜ` projections and `op` compositions are defeq but not
230	  syntactic, so plain `rw`/`simp only` silently no-op. Use `erw` for projection lemmas (`Pi.map_π`,
231	  `piComparison_comp_π_assoc`, `Pi.lift_π`, `Sigma.ι_desc`) and term-mode `exact`/`congrArg` for
232	  `Functor.map_comp` combines (`← Functor.map_comp` also refuses to fire on `erw`-produced terms).
233	  (CechBridge `homCechSectionIsoApp_hom_π`.) These proofs are version-fragile — flag if refactored.
234	- **Away-localisation comparison parameterised by `Inverts`, not divisibility (iter-018)**: the
235	  canonical map `M_a → Mb` between module localisations exists whenever `a` acts invertibly on `Mb`
236	  (`Inverts a Mb := IsUnit (algebraMap R (End R Mb) a)`), built via `IsLocalizedModule.lift`,
237	  characterised by uniqueness. Parameterise by `Inverts`, NOT `a ∣ b` — the Čech prepend (`c`) map's
238	  source element `s r²·s_σ` does NOT divide the target `s r·s_σ`, only its factors are invertible, so
239	  the divisibility form cannot type the map. `Inverts.of_dvd` / `Inverts.mul` supply the hypothesis.

242	  (CechAcyclic `AwayComparison`/`CechLocalized`, axiom-clean.)

244	  but not the homological-complex-level version. Lift it: `Functor.mapHomologyIso' :=
245	  (K.sc i).mapHomologyIso F`, valid because `((F.mapHomologicalComplex c).obj K).sc i` is defeq to
246	  `(K.sc i).map F` (needs `[F.Additive] [F.PreservesHomology]`). The reusable 01XJ engine
247	  `PresheafOfModules.homologyIsoSheafify` (`K.homology i ≅ sheafify((forget K).homology i)`) is built
248	  from this + `counitComplexIso` (via `sheafificationAdjunction.counit` `IsIso` +
249	  `isoOfComponents`); sheafification's `PreservesHomology` is `inferInstance` (exact = left-adjoint +
250	  finite-limit-preserving).

252	  `AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule` — the comparison `M_a → M_{ab}` is

254	  builds the preimage from `IsLocalizedModule.surj` of the product submonoid; injectivity via the

266	  element generic in `map_dDiff_eq_locDiff` so the localised map's instance arg (which mentions `↑ρ`)

269	  `homCechSectionCosimplicialIso` (`NatIso.ofComponents`), plain `rw [Category.assoc]` /

  `sectionCechFaceRestr`, `sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact`) rather than re-deriving the
  section-complex homology bridge (~100 lines saved).

  `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` CLOSED — the 4–5-iter P3b bottleneck)**: to prove a chain-complex
  augmentation `K• ⟶ A[0]` is a quasi-iso, transfer from a combinatorial engine model along an
  `Arrow.isoMk'`: `quasiIso_of_arrow_mk_iso (engineAug) _ (Arrow.isoMk' _ _ chainIso rightIso hcomm)`.
  Build the four inputs: (1) **engine resolution** `engineAug_quasiIso` — positive degrees via
  `quasiIsoAt_iff_exactAt'` + `ChainComplex.exactAt_succ_single_obj` + the prebuilt engine acyclicity;
  degree 0 via `ChainComplex.quasiIsoAt₀_iff` + `ShortComplex.quasiIso_iff_isIso_descOpcycles`,
  exhibiting the explicit inverse `ι_{const} ≫ pOpcycles` from a degree-0 splitting `s≫d+g≫r=𝟙`
  (`hg₁`/`hf₂`/`hg₂` are `rfl` ONLY against the literal `ModuleCat (X.ringCatSheaf…)` — abstracting with
  `set R` defeats simp-normal form; `erw [S.p_descOpcycles]`). (2) **degree-0 evaluation bridge**
  `(eval V)(freeAug) = chainIso.f 0 ≫ engineAug0`, by `Sigma.hom_ext` + `by_cases V ≤ U_σ` +
  `reassoc_of%`. (3) **geometric identification** `(eval V) O_𝒰 ≅ A`: `O_𝒰 = image(freeAug)`, eval
  preserves finite limits ⇒ `(eval)(image.ι)` mono, epi from the deg-0 bridge (iso ≫ split-epi); mono+epi
  ⇒ iso via `isIso_of_mono_of_epi` (`Balanced (ModuleCat _)`) — feed the instance EXPLICITLY:
  `@asIso _ _ _ _ f inst`. (4) **hcomm** reduces via `ChainComplex.toSingle₀Equiv.injective` +
  `Subtype.ext` to the deg-0 bridge modulo `singleObjXSelf` eqToHom (collapse with
  `erw [eqToHom_refl]` after `Category.assoc`). Then glue with `quasiIso_of_evaluation` + `by_cases`.
- **Čech-H¹ sheaf-gluing surjectivity assembly (iter-024, `ses_cech_h1` CLOSED)**: the full Stacks
  `lemma-ses-cech-h1` from a single cover with `IsZero((sectionCechComplex U F).homology 1)` + local
  lifts: form G-difference cochain (`sectionCech_objD_apply`), kill via `gπ` naturality (alternating
  `∑(-1)^i=0`), lift to F via the kernel hypothesis, extract the coboundary via the iter-023 heart
  `sectionCech_one_coboundary_of_isZero_homology`, correct the family `g' = sLoc' − fι(t)`, prove
  pairwise double-overlap agreement, glue via `hGsh.isSheafUniqueGluing`, conclude by `H`-separatedness
  uniqueness. Three reusable tactic lessons (each cost real time): (a) **LSP staleness** —
  `lean_diagnostic_messages`/`lean_goal` returned stale "no errors" after edits while `lake build` had 4;
  trust ONLY `lake env lean <file>` / `lean_run_code` mid-session. (b) `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply`
  collapse on `IsCompatible`/`IsGluing` goals needs `erw`, applied as ×k `← comp_apply` THEN ×k
  `← P.presheaf.map_comp` (NOT interleaved); parallel `Opens`-op composites then agree by proof
  irrelevance (`restr_op_unique`/`restr_inj_of_eq` via `Quiver.Hom.unop_inj (Subsingleton.elim _ _)`).
  (c) the `![i,j]∘δ` vs `fun _=>·` heterogeneous index mismatch is unsolvable by `rw`/`simp`
  (motive-not-type-correct / HEq); `restr_g'_transport` takes the tuple equality as a hypothesis and
  `subst`s it (variables ⇒ no motive issue). Also: `set_option maxHeartbeats N in` must PRECEDE the
  docstring, not sit between docstring and theorem (else `unexpected token set_option`).

# iter-024 review

## Overall progress this iter
- **Total sorry**: 2 → 2 (no regression). Both intentional/frozen: superseded relative-form
  `CechAcyclic.lean:110` (`affine`, blueprint-authorized `% NOTE`) + frozen P5b
  `CechHigherDirectImage.lean:679`.
- **Build**: GREEN. Both touched files `lake env lean … → EXIT 0`, 0 warnings; both named targets
  `lean_verify`-clean (`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`).
- **Lanes planned 2, ran 2** (CechBridge, FreePresheafComplex — parallel mathlib-build).
- **+21 axiom-clean declarations** (11 CechBridge + 10 FreePresheafComplex); **0 new sorries**;
  **2 named blueprint targets landed — both lanes' targets**.

## The headline: both lane bottlenecks closed in one iter
The strongest iter in the recent window. Two independent named targets landed axiom-clean:

- **`cechFreeComplex_quasiIso`** (FreePresheafComplex, +10) — the free Čech complex augmentation is
  a quasi-isomorphism / free resolution of `O_𝒰`. This was the project's **longest churn** (named
  target absent iters 020–023). It landed via exactly the iter-022 mathlib-analogist's **Route B**
  (arrow-iso transfer, NOT Homotopy repackaging): engine resolution `cechEngineComplexAug_quasiIso`
  (positive degrees from prebuilt `cechEngineComplex_exactAt`; degree 0 from `descOpcycles` + the
  `cechEngineAug0_split` splitting), a degree-0 evaluation bridge `cechFreeAug_eval_eq`, a geometric
  identification `coverStructurePresheafEval_iso` (`(eval V) O_𝒰 ≅ O_X(V)` via mono+epi ⇒ iso), and
  `quasiIso_of_arrow_mk_iso` along `cechFreeEvalEngineIso`. lvb: PASS, axiom-clean, signature exact,
  resolution genuine, 0 red flags.

- **`ses_cech_h1`** (CechBridge, +11) — Čech-H¹ sheaf-gluing surjectivity, the full Stacks
  `lemma-ses-cech-h1` assembly the iter-023 review flagged as the "pure sheaf theory" residual.
  Built on the iter-023 Čech-H¹ heart `sectionCech_one_coboundary_of_isZero_homology`. lvb:
  faithful realization (the single-cover-with-local-lifts design is a faithful decomposition of the
  Stacks "cofinal system" argument, with a correct minor generalization — `F` not required a
  sheaf), axiom-clean, 0 red flags.

## This iter's analysis
- **Both lanes were honest convergence; the strategy needs no change.** The two routes were
  independent and both closed. The iter-023 "decision point" for Route 2 (escalate-if-not-landed)
  did not need to fire — the residual genuinely collapsed and landed.
- **The dominant cost was Lean-engineering, not new mathematics** — defeq-carrier / functor-coercion
  `rw`-failures (the recurring project obstacle class), plus a costly **LSP-staleness** episode in
  CechBridge (file-level diagnostics reported stale "no errors" after edits while `lake build` had
  4). Both captured in the Knowledge Base as reusable patterns.
- **No must-fix Lean findings.** lean-auditor: 0 must-fix; the only majors are 2 STALE CechBridge
  module docstrings (still call `ses_cech_h1` "(planned)" and `injective_cech_acyclic` "gated on
  Lane-1" — both now false). These need a prover (review cannot edit `.lean`); queued in
  recommendations for the next time CechBridge is opened.
- **Blueprint coverage debt grew** to 32 unmatched `lean_aux` nodes (both lvb reports flagged this
  major). The planner should bundle them — grouped (A–D) in `session_24/recommendations.md`. The
  review agent does not author prose.

## Frontier unblocked
`injective_cech_acyclic`'s two gates — Lane-1 `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` and `ses_cech_h1` — are
both now in hand. Both task results describe it as a one-step op-transport assembly
(`quasiIso_map_preadditiveYoneda_of_injective` + `sectionCechComplexMapOpIso`, both present). Next
iter should dispatch it, then the 01EO → 02KG chain that re-enables the frozen P5b
(`cech_computes_higherDirectImage`).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` added 6 markers (iter=024, sha 9f92249) covering the two new named targets and
  helpers. No `\mathlibok` needed (all new decls are project-internal, not Mathlib re-exports); no
  `\lean{...}` renames flagged (names matched plan hints); no stale `\notready` on landed blocks.
- NOTE for the planner: lvb/CechBridge observed `lem:cech_complex_hom_identification`,
  `lem:cech_complex_op_identification`, `lem:hom_into_injective_exact` lack `\leanok` despite
  complete Lean — a likely `sync_leanok` artifact from a bundled `private` name. `\leanok` is
  sync-owned; flagged (not touched) for the planner to check the `\lean{...}` lists.

## blueprint-doctor
Clean — no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new `axiom` declarations.

## Subagent skips
- None. Both [HIGHLY RECOMMENDED] review subagents dispatched (lean-auditor `iter024`;
  lean-vs-blueprint-checker on both prover-touched files — `cechbridge-024`, `freepresheaf-024`).
